_meta.purpose: Module catalog. Each row links to a REAL external course. 'tags' drive profile-based personalisation (a course is recommended when its tags overlap the user's target field/interests). 'alwaysShow: true' pins soft-skill/general courses so everyone sees them regardless of field. 'level' (beginner|intermediate|advanced) drives seniority-aware recommendations: final-year/postgrad students stop being recommended beginner fundamentals. Career-prep courses (tag 'career-prep') are pinned for senior university students. Edit + restart to update (upsert by key).
_meta.status: curated real catalog - verify links periodically
_meta.levels: beginner = first exposure / fundamentals; intermediate = applied, assumes basics; advanced = specialised / professional. Career-prep = interview, portfolio, job-readiness (senior university).

modules.title: Introduction to Public Speaking
modules.description: Structure a talk and beat nerves with a simple framework.
modules.cvTip: List a presentation you've given to show communication skills.

modules.title: Writing a Standout CV / Resume
modules.description: Turn activities into achievement-led bullet points.
modules.cvTip: Rewrite one bullet using the action + result formula.

modules.title: Learning How to Learn
modules.description: Proven techniques to study effectively and manage deadlines.
modules.cvTip: Mention a self-managed project to show initiative.

modules.title: Professional Networking
modules.description: Reach out, follow up, and build genuine connections.
modules.cvTip: Add a LinkedIn URL and keep it current.

modules.title: What Is Data Science?
modules.description: Understand what data science is and how data drives decisions.
modules.cvTip: Add 'Data Literacy' under skills.

modules.title: Intro to Computer Programming
modules.description: Variables, loops, and building your first tiny program.
modules.cvTip: Add a mini project to a portfolio link on your CV.

modules.title: Python for Data Analysis
modules.description: Clean, analyse and visualise real datasets with pandas.
modules.cvTip: Publish a notebook analysing a dataset you care about.

modules.title: Machine Learning Specialization
modules.description: Supervised and unsupervised learning, hands-on.
modules.cvTip: Deploy a small ML model and link it on your CV.

modules.title: Basics of Electronics & Semiconductors
modules.description: How electronic components and chips actually work.
modules.cvTip: Reference lab or fabrication experience.

modules.title: Circuit Design & Analysis
modules.description: Design and analyse analog and digital circuits.
modules.cvTip: Show a circuit you designed or simulated.

modules.title: VLSI & Chip Design
modules.description: Digital chip design flow from RTL to layout.
modules.cvTip: Mention any HDL (Verilog/VHDL) or tape-out coursework.

modules.title: Culinary Fundamentals
modules.description: Knife skills, cooking methods, and kitchen safety.
modules.cvTip: List dishes/techniques and any kitchen experience.

modules.title: Advanced Pastry & Baking
modules.description: Laminated doughs, plated desserts, and precision technique.
modules.cvTip: Photograph a plated dessert for your portfolio.

modules.title: Hospitality & Customer Service
modules.description: Guest experience, front-of-house, and service excellence.
modules.cvTip: Highlight any customer-facing or service roles.

modules.title: Hospitality Management
modules.description: Run operations, revenue and teams in hospitality settings.
modules.cvTip: Mention any supervisory or event-coordination experience.

modules.title: Introduction to Business & Management
modules.description: Core business concepts: marketing, operations, finance.
modules.cvTip: Mention any team or project leadership.

modules.title: Marketing Analytics
modules.description: Measure campaigns and turn marketing data into decisions.
modules.cvTip: Add a campaign or A/B test you analysed.

modules.title: Business Strategy
modules.description: Competitive analysis, positioning and strategic decisions.
modules.cvTip: Reference a case competition or strategy project.

modules.title: Interview Preparation (Behavioural + Technical)
modules.description: STAR answers, common questions, and mock-interview practice.
modules.cvTip: Prepare 3 STAR stories tied to your top achievements.

modules.title: Building a Professional Portfolio
modules.description: Package your projects into a portfolio employers trust.
modules.cvTip: Publish a portfolio site and link it at the top of your CV.
